import io
import string
import list

fn unwrap_int(_ o: Option<Int>) -> Int
  match o
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("none")
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut have = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = unwrap_int(string.byte_at(s, i))
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if have
        result = list.push(result, sign * val)
        have = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      have = true
    else if b == 43
      have = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    result = list.push(result, sign * val)
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let x = unwrap_int(a.get(i))
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted = []
  mut remaining = xs
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_idx = 0
    mut min_val = unwrap_int(remaining.get(0))
    mut i = 1
    while i < remaining.len()
      let v = unwrap_int(remaining.get(i))
      if v < min_val
        min_val = v
        min_idx = i
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut new_rem = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < remaining.len()
      if j != min_idx
        new_rem = list.push(new_rem, unwrap_int(remaining.get(j)))
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  sorted
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let x = unwrap_int(sorted.get(i))
    if i == 0
      out = "#{x}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
